name: Nupe
notes: Nupe, a Nupoid (Volta-Niger) language of central Nigeria, written in a Latin orthography with subdot letters and tone marks. The grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified: Wikidata supplies no ISO 639-3 code, Glottolog code, script statement or Wikipedia article for this Wikimedia language code, and the Nupe orthography (which marks three tones and labialised/palatalised consonant series) has not been verified against a descriptive source. Metadata only. wikidata_qid left unset: the code's Wikidata row resolves to the Wikimedia project item, not the language item; not recorded rather than record a wrong id.

ancestors.notes: Atlantic-Congo — the classification node this language sits under.
